65.3,-18.9.ch: CHAPTER LXXVII. GRETTIR'S CASE BEFORE THE ALL-THING
65.3,-18.9.p: The men of Skagafjord were little pleased at the prospect of Grettir being freed, and they told Thorbjorn Angle that he must do one of the two, resign his holding in the island or kill Grettir.
